title: Lesson 254: 通う, 硝子, 彼...

items.gloss: to go to and from (a place); to go back and forth between; to run between (e.g. bus, train, etc.); to ply between; to go to (school, work, etc.); to attend; to commute; to frequent; to circulate (e.g. blood, electricity); to be communicated (e.g. thought); to resemble
those (indicating something distant from both speaker and listener, or something understood without naming it directly); they (of people)
